notes:
v2.5.2 Update
🖼️ Compact portrait framing: New zoom and X/Y offset controls to reframe portraits on collapsed cards, separate from the expanded card.
🐛 PF2e fix: NPC attacks show up in the action menu again.

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.5.2
announcement.content:
v2.5.2 adds compact portrait framing and fixes PF2e NPC attacks.

  • Compact portrait framing: Collapsed cards get their own portrait zoom and X/Y offset, so you can reframe a head in compact mode without changing the expanded card. Works globally and per actor, on every built-in theme.
  • PF2e NPC strikes: NPC attacks no longer vanish from the action menu.
